hero.title: AI Implementation Bootcamp
hero.tagline: "Build practical AI workforces for every role in your company"

details.venueAddress:
39-07, Menara EcoWorld @ BBCC,
2, Jln Hang Tuah, Bukit Bintang,
55100 Kuala Lumpur

venueGuide.grabHeading: If You Are Taking Grab To The Venue
venueGuide.drivingHeading: If You Are Driving To The Venue

parking.name: Lalaport BBCC
parking.photoCaption: Park at Zone C (Blue Zone), pillars C1–C4

venueGuide.lobbyHeading: When You Arrive At The Venue Lobby
venueGuide.lobbyText: Head to the reception counter to register. Mention to the security guards that you are going up to Level 39, Unit 07.
venueGuide.lobbyCaption: Building lobby — head to the reception counter upon arrival

whatToBring.text: Your laptop (Mac or Windows), fully charged
Jacket (Highly recommended! The room will be cold.)
An open mind — these tools can do things you've never seen

items.title: Subscribe to a paid Claude plan
items.description: Pro ($20/mo) minimum. Max ($100/mo) recommended for the best Chrome experience.

items.title: Install Claude Desktop
items.description: Download from claude.com/download — choose your OS (Mac or Windows).

items.title: Install Claude in Chrome
items.description: Find it in the Chrome Web Store. Pin the extension to your toolbar.

items.title: Prepare a folder of real work files
items.description: Pick a folder relevant to your job. Back it up first — we'll be using AI tools that can modify files.

dressCode.label: Smart Casual
dressCode.note: Bring a jacket along as the room will be cold.

faq.question: Can I transfer my ticket to someone else?
faq.answer: Yes. Tickets are non-refundable but transferable within the same company. Just inform us 5 working days before the workshop so we can update your attendee information.

faq.question: Is there any translation service?
faq.answer: The workshop will be conducted entirely in English, and no translation will be provided.

faq.question: Is the workshop HRDC Claimable?
faq.answer: Yes. AI Implementation Bootcamp is HRD Corp claimable under the HRD Corp training schemes, subject to your company's eligibility and levy balance.
